name_en: Russian Orthodox Cathedral of Saint Nicholas

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the dress code for entering the cathedral
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une tenue vestimentaire requise pour visiter la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon teh-NOO ves-tee-man-TEHR reh-KEEZ poor vee-zee-TAY lah kah-tay-DRAL
phrases.cultural_note: As an active Orthodox church, shoulders and knees must be covered. Scarves are sometimes available at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the cathedral closes
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ferme la cathédrale aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR FERM lah kah-tay-DRAHL oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: The Russian Orthodox Cathedral has specific visiting hours that vary by season. Check the posted schedule at the gate.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an entry fee
phrases.text_local: L'entrée de la cathédrale est-elle payante ?
phrases.pronunciation: lan-TRAY deh lah kah-tay-DRAL eh-TEL pay-ANT
phrases.cultural_note: Entry is free, though a voluntary donation is appreciated. Guided tours are available for a small fee.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an audio guide available
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a un audioguide disponible ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess keel ee ah uhn oh-dee-oh-GEED dees-poh-NEEBL
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides help visitors understand the Orthodox iconography and architecture. They are usually available in several languages.

responses.phonetic: wee ahn frahn-SAY ay ahn ahn-GLAY
responses.french: Oui, en français et en anglais.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if religious services are held in Russian
phrases.text_local: Les offices religieux sont-ils célébrés en russe ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay zo-FEES reh-lee-ZHYUH son-TEEL say-lay-BRAY on ROOS
phrases.cultural_note: Services are conducted in Church Slavonic and Russian. The cathedral serves Nice's Russian community and attracts many tourists.
